heroHeadline: Day 43: US Intel Warns China Taking Active Role in Iran War; Israel Rejects Hezbollah Ceasefire
heroSubtitle: US intelligence assessments find China moving beyond ceasefire diplomacy to a more active role in the Iran war, per a New York Times report — raising alarm as US negotiators press ahead with Iran ceasefire talks in Islamabad. Israel separately rejected a ceasefire with Hezbollah, insisting the Lebanon front is an independent theater.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-11. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal, The Independent.
